remove_templates: Remove the {target} and fill the space with matching wall and flooring. Keep everything else in the kitchen unchanged.
Erase the {target} from the scene and reconstruct the surfaces behind it to match the surrounding wall and floor. Do not change anything else.
move_templates: Move the {target} to {destination}. Keep everything else in the kitchen unchanged.
Relocate the {target} so it sits at {destination}. Rebuild the surface where it previously stood to match the surrounding materials. Do not change anything else.
open_wall_templates: Remove {wall_description} and open the kitchen to the adjacent room. Keep all other walls, cabinets, and surfaces unchanged.
Demolish {wall_description} to create an open-plan kitchen. Fill the gap with what would logically be visible beyond. Do not change anything else.

caveats.move: Placement and scale are approximate. This shows rough feel, not accurate measurements.
caveats.open_wall: The space beyond the removed wall is invented — not the real adjacent room. Use for visual inspiration only.
